subcodes.first_line: O thou sapling of the garden of the love of God! Thy letter was received and its contents brought joy at the threshold of the Most Glorious Beauty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای نهال باغ محبت الله نامه رسید و مضمون سبب سرور گردید از درگاه جمال ابهی
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
